_comment: Curated community links per class — manually maintained, verified before adding, NEVER auto-scraped into tiers. Discord content is not fetchable (auth + TOS); these are links only. Creators are opinion/analysis sources — the kind our PTR writeups quote. Index source: wowhead.com/discord-servers (render via r.jina.ai). Verify creator recency via YouTube oEmbed.
